english: Golden Rooster Stands on One Leg
visual: Tall one-legged stance with the raised knee lifted to waist height and the same-side hand raised high with fingers pointing up.
motion_description: The motion begins as the weight shifts entirely onto the left leg, accompanied by a slow elevation of the right knee to waist height. Concurrently, the right hand rises vertically in front of the torso with fingers pointing upward, while the left hand lowers slightly to hover near the hip. After a deliberate pause in this balanced posture, the raised foot steps down softly to a wide stance, and the movement flows continuously into a mirrored sequence on the opposite side with the left knee and hand rising.
